column1: # sap_release_object_types.tsv  -  E071 object-type label map for /sap-release-notes
# Maps a transport-object (PGMID, OBJECT) pair to a human-readable label so the CAB
# pack reads in business terms instead of raw 4-char codes. Lookup order in the
# inventory engine: (1) exact (pgmid, object) match; (2) object-only match (pgmid '*');
# (3) fall through to the RAW code (never an invented label).
# Curated from the standard R3TR / LIMU object-type universe incl. the S/4-era
# RAP/CDS types (DDLS/DCLS/DDLX/SRVD/SRVB/BDEF). Unknown / new codes render raw by
# design -- add a row here rather than guessing in code. Customer override:
# Cell separator is TAB. Lines starting with # and blank lines are skipped.
